TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Cirakesay = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Furisyang ka alang Cirakesay. 58 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 124 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 82% niqan 102 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 18% niqan 22 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis77%, Tayal1%, Bunun3%, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq1%. Pusu nniqan alang Dungus kari hangan nii o Lakes, hangan dxgal, dungus kari nii o Cira kesay "niqan qhuni Cangsu nniqan". Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki nsgan Furi alang Dungri. Gasuc Hraan hidaw o dgiyaq Wanjn, mniq hunac yayung Ameysi. Tiri lnglingay Kska dgiyaq. Pgkla patas cyawtung Tduwa asi ppanan rulu qrngul quri sngayan rulu qrngul Furi. Mnuda su saw elug tay 9 syeyn quri Taytung do muda su da. „ÄąSkanki -Sofung -Fungrin -Kwanfu -Jweyswey -Yuri -Furi „ÄČ, Asi ka niqan 2 patas hidaw ka dhuq Furi. Klegan seejiq nealang Amis. Djiyun kari Kari Amis ni Tlu. Snhiyan cungcyaw Joro. Pnaah alang Mniq saw mnrmuxan Tanah Tunux siida, kmlawa bi klwaan ka qqhuni cangsu alang Cirakesay, sluun dha Cangnaw. Bukuy bi mnrmuxan Tanah Tunux siida do, iyux miing qmpah dxgal ka Amis kika tnhjilan hini, gaga mniq ssiyaw kska yayung Ameysi ka snduray, yasa mniq hngkwasan 63 siida o niqan paru gbihur mtmay kiya ni snliqan kana ka alang, ida tnhjilan ssiyaw kska yayung Ameysi ka Amis, dhuq sayang. Pgkla patas saan rmigaw Nsgan Furi prngaw patas saan rmigaw
S.PHON: = ¶i…ĺak…ôsaj = gaga mniq ńßwa…ĺ…ôs…ôn *u…ĺisjaŇč ka alaŇč ¶i…ĺak…ôsaj. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis**%, tajal*%, bunun*%, s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ôdiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ôdiq*%. pusu nniqan alaŇč duŇčus ka…ĺi ńßaŇčan nii o lak…ôs, ńßaŇčan dxgal, duŇčus ka…ĺi nii o ¶i…ĺa k…ôsaj "niqan qńßuni ¶aŇčsu nniqan". nniqan alaŇč njusan skanki nsgan *u…ĺi alaŇč duŇč…ĺi. gasu ¶ ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw o dgijaq wan…ün, mniq ńßuna ¶ jajuŇč am…ôsi. ti…ĺi lŇčliŇčaj kska dgijaq. pgkla patas ¶jawtuŇč tduwa asi ppanan …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul qu…ĺi sŇčajan …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul *u…ĺi. mnuda su saw …ôlug taj * sj…ôn qu…ĺi tajtuŇč do muda su da. *skanki -so*uŇč -*uŇč…ĺin -kwan*u -…üw…ôsw…ô -ju…ĺi -*u…ĺi *, asi ka niqan * patas ńßidaw ka dńßuq *u…ĺi. kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq n…ôalaŇč amis. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi amis ni tlu. snńßijan ¶uŇč ¶jaw …üo…ĺo. pnaańß alaŇč mniq saw mn…ĺmuxan tanańß tunux siida, kmlawa bi klwaan ka qqńßuni ¶aŇčsu alaŇč ¶i…ĺak…ôsaj, sluun dńßa ¶aŇčnaw. bukuj bi mn…ĺmuxan tanańß tunux siida do, ijux miiŇč qmpańß dxgal ka amis kika tnńß…üilan ńßini, gaga mniq ssijaw kska jajuŇč am…ôsi ka sndu…ĺaj, jasa mniq ńßŇčkwasan ** siida o niqan pa…ĺu gbińßu…ĺ mtmaj kija ni snliqan kana ka alaŇč, ida tnńß…üilan ssijaw kska jajuŇč am…ôsi ka amis, dńßuq sajaŇč. pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw nsgan *u…ĺi p…ĺŇčaw patas saan …ĺmigaw
S.FORM: = Cirakesay = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Furisyang ka alang Cirakesay. 58 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 124 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 82% niqan 102 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 18% niqan 22 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis77%, Tayal1%, Bunun3%, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq1%. Pusu nniqan alang Dungus kari hangan nii o Lakes, hangan dxgal, dungus kari nii o Cira kesay "niqan qhuni Cangsu nniqan". Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki nsgan Furi alang Dungri. Gasuc Hraan hidaw o dgiyaq Wanjn, mniq hunac yayung Ameysi. Tiri lnglingay Kska dgiyaq. Pgkla patas cyawtung Tduwa asi ppanan rulu qrngul quri sngayan rulu qrngul Furi. Mnuda su saw elug tay 9 syeyn quri Taytung do muda su da. „ÄąSkanki -Sofung -Fungrin -Kwanfu -Jweyswey -Yuri -Furi „ÄČ, Asi ka niqan 2 patas hidaw ka dhuq Furi. Klegan seejiq nealang Amis. Djiyun kari Kari Amis ni Tlu. Snhiyan cungcyaw Joro. Pnaah alang Mniq saw mnrmuxan Tanah Tunux siida, kmlawa bi klwaan ka qqhuni cangsu alang Cirakesay, sluun dha Cangnaw. Bukuy bi mnrmuxan Tanah Tunux siida do, iyux miing qmpah dxgal ka Amis kika tnhjilan hini, gaga mniq ssiyaw kska yayung Ameysi ka snduray, yasa mniq hngkwasan 63 siida o niqan paru gbihur mtmay kiya ni snliqan kana ka alang, ida tnhjilan ssiyaw kska yayung Ameysi ka Amis, dhuq sayang. Pgkla patas saan rmigaw Nsgan Furi prngaw patas saan rmigaw
S.PHON: = ¶i…ĺak…ôsaj = gaga mniq ńßwa…ĺ…ôs…ôn *u…ĺisjaŇč ka alaŇč ¶i…ĺak…ôsaj. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis**%, tajal*%, bunun*%, s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ôdiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ôdiq*%. pusu nniqan alaŇč duŇčus ka…ĺi ńßaŇčan nii o lak…ôs, ńßaŇčan dxgal, duŇčus ka…ĺi nii o ¶i…ĺa k…ôsaj "niqan qńßuni ¶aŇčsu nniqan". nniqan alaŇč njusan skanki nsgan *u…ĺi alaŇč duŇč…ĺi. gasu ¶ ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw o dgijaq wan…ün, mniq ńßuna ¶ jajuŇč am…ôsi. ti…ĺi lŇčliŇčaj kska dgijaq. pgkla patas ¶jawtuŇč tduwa asi ppanan …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul qu…ĺi sŇčajan …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul *u…ĺi. mnuda su saw …ôlug taj * sj…ôn qu…ĺi tajtuŇč do muda su da. *skanki -so*uŇč -*uŇč…ĺin -kwan*u -…üw…ôsw…ô -ju…ĺi -*u…ĺi *, asi ka niqan * patas ńßidaw ka dńßuq *u…ĺi. kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq n…ôalaŇč amis. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi amis ni tlu. snńßijan ¶uŇč ¶jaw …üo…ĺo. pnaańß alaŇč mniq saw mn…ĺmuxan tanańß tunux siida, kmlawa bi klwaan ka qqńßuni ¶aŇčsu alaŇč ¶i…ĺak…ôsaj, sluun dńßa ¶aŇčnaw. bukuj bi mn…ĺmuxan tanańß tunux siida do, ijux miiŇč qmpańß dxgal ka amis kika tnńß…üilan ńßini, gaga mniq ssijaw kska jajuŇč am…ôsi ka sndu…ĺaj, jasa mniq ńßŇčkwasan ** siida o niqan pa…ĺu gbińßu…ĺ mtmaj kija ni snliqan kana ka alaŇč, ida tnńß…üilan ssijaw kska jajuŇč am…ôsi ka amis, dńßuq sajaŇč. pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw nsgan *u…ĺi p…ĺŇčaw patas saan …ĺmigaw
